zh.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cicely Riddlesworth於1470年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，她的父親John or Robert Riddlesworth25歲，母親Mrs. Riddlesworth21歲。她於大約1490年與James Hill在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1493年在她的家鄉享年23歲。

zh-hans.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cicely Riddlesworth于1470年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲时，她的父亲John or Robert Riddlesworth25岁，母亲Mrs. Riddlesworth21岁。她于大约1490年与James Hill在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1493年在她的家乡享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: Riddlesworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly English: habitational name from a lost orunidentified place, possibly so named from Old English midel‘middle’ + worth ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

en.lifeSummary: When Cicely Riddlesworth was born in 1470, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John or Robert Riddlesworth, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Riddlesworth, was 21. She married James Hill about 1490, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1493, in her hometown, at the age of 23.

fr.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cicely Riddlesworth est née en 1470, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John or Robert Riddlesworth, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Riddlesworth, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé James Hill environ 1490, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Cicely Riddlesworth 1470 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John or Robert Riddlesworth 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Riddlesworth 21. Sie hat um 1490 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom James Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1493 im Alter von 23 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Riddlesworth è nata il nel 1470 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John or Robert Riddlesworth, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Riddlesworth, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato James Hill circa 1490, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1493, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズ
ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Riddlesworthが1470年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父John or Robert Riddlesworthは25歳，母Mrs. Riddlesworthは21歳であった。約1490年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでJames Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1493年に故郷で23歳で死去した。

ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Riddlesworth(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John or Robert Riddlesworth(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Riddlesworth(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 James Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 그녀의 고향에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Riddlesworth nasceu em 1470, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John or Robert Riddlesworth, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Riddlesworth, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com James Hill aproximadamente 1490, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 23 anos.

ru.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cicely Riddlesworth родилась в 1470 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John or Robert Riddlesworth было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Riddlesworth, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Hill около 1490 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1493 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 23 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cicely Riddlesworth nació en 1470, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John or Robert Riddlesworth, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Riddlesworth, tenía 21 años. Se casó con James Hill aproximadamente 1490, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 23 años.
